name: Aberdeen's IT Professional Services Practice — Coverage Areas
description: This document describes Aberdeen Group's IT Professional Services practice structure and coverage areas as of January 1999, organized in a matrix by market initiative and supplier type. It identifies four key market segments—Windows 2000 infrastructure, ERP/Supply Chain, Customer Information Systems, and Education—and provides a detailed vendor landscape for each. The document concludes with a sample IBM Global Services profile illustrating Aberdeen's analyst methodology.
